summary: Testing iteration 10 - All 4 new features verified: (1) Demo toggle endpoints working with round-trip, (2) Hindi voice button present on all bot messages, (3) Tick marks with animations present on user messages, (4) /app/pitch.md contains all required sections including demo phrase and quick reference table. Backend 8/8 tests passed, Frontend 7/7 features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/demo/toggle toggles demo_mode and returns new state
Backend: Toggle works round-trip (true→false→true→back to original)
Backend: Chat messages include status field for tick marks (sent/delivered/read)
File: /app/pitch.md contains all 5 required sections (Problem, Demo, How It Works, Impact, The Ask)
File: /app/pitch.md contains demo phrase 'Mera beta 10th pass hai'
Frontend: Sidebar has Demo Mode toggle row (data-testid='demo-toggle-row')
Frontend: Demo toggle button (data-testid='demo-toggle-btn') is clickable with amber styling
Frontend: Demo toggle shows 'Stage-ready' when ON and 'Off' when disabled
Frontend: Clicking demo toggle changes backend demo state
Frontend: Bot messages have Hindi voice button (data-testid='hindi-voice-btn') - 46 buttons found
Frontend: Hindi voice button uses Volume2 icon and is clickable
Frontend: User messages show tick marks (data-testid='tick-blue') - 46 blue ticks found (read status)
critical_code_review_comments: Demo toggle endpoints correctly use global DEMO_MODE variable with proper toggle logic
HindiVoiceBtn component uses window.speechSynthesis with lang='hi-IN' - browser native TTS, no external API
TickStatus component properly renders CheckIcon for 'sent' and CheckCheck for 'delivered'/'read' with animation classes
CSS animations tick-sent-anim, tick-deliver-anim, tick-read-anim, voice-pulse all defined in index.css
Sidebar.js correctly fetches demo status on open and calls POST /api/demo/toggle on button click
/app/pitch.md is a complete 3-minute stage pitch with proper timing markers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 added: (1) Demo toggle API at /api/demo/status and /api/demo/toggle, (2) HindiVoiceBtn component on all bot messages using browser SpeechSynthesis, (3) TickStatus component with animated ticks for sent/delivered/read states, (4) /app/pitch.md complete 3-min script. All features working. DEMO_MODE=true in backend/.env. Hindi TTS uses browser native API (no external service). Sidebar trigger is data-testid='header-menu-btn' in AppHeader.js.

mocked_apis_list: demo_stage_response: Hardcoded demo flow with DEMO_PROFILE, VIDYASIRI_RESULT, PMKISAN_DEMO_RESULT
auth: Static OTP 1234 for any phone number
Hindi TTS: Browser SpeechSynthesis API (no external service)
